notes: Create these exact API names in Steamworks before any unlock code is armed.
Do not change API names after they are published unless the game-side map is updated too.
Unlock calls remain locked in this pass.

achievements.trigger: When the player starts gameplay for the first time.
When the player recruits one soldier.
When the player captures one turf point.
When the player defeats any boss for the first time.

achievements.description: Unlock your first Legendary Chigga Wear item.
achievements.trigger: When a Legendary cosmetic entitlement is unlocked. Keep locked until real billing exists.
When the player reaches or clears Stage 5.
When the player reaches or clears Stage 10.
